string.name: This_method_converts_normal_JavaScript_object_into_instance_specific_class
string.value: This method converts a normal JavaScript object into an instance of a specific class

string.name: This_method_converts_class_object_back_normal_JavaScript_object
string.value: This method converts the class object back to a normal JavaScript object

string.name: Merge_class_instance_with_normal_JavaScript_object
string.value: Merge a class instance with a normal JavaScript object

string.name: This_method_converts_normal_object_instance_using_populated_object
string.value: This method converts a normal object to an instance using a populated object (an instance in the target class.

string.name: Converts_class_object_to_new_class
string.value: Converts a class (constructor) object to a new class (constructor) object. Also works with arrays.

string.name: Converts_a_class_object_to_plain_object
string.value: Converts a class (constructor) object to a plain (literal) object.

string.name: Serialize_given_object_as_JSON_string
string.value: Serialize a given object as a JSON string.

string.name: Converts_object_string_to_instance_of_class
string.value: Converts an object string to an instance of a class
